title: ceratochloa marginata
intro: Ceratochloa marginata, also known as the rice grass, is a type of plant species in the grass family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asian cultures, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceratochloa marginata are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Ceratochloa marginata include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, often used to treat a variety of ailments.
